name: awesome-ascend-plugins
description: A marketplace of Ascend NPU developer plugins. Includes AscendC Operator Studio, a self-contained closed-loop agent plugin for end-to-end AscendC custom operator development.

plugins.name: ascendc-operator-studio
plugins.description: Self-contained, closed-loop agent plugin for end-to-end AscendC custom operator development on Ascend NPU (ascend-kernel / csrc/ops + build.sh + torch_npu). Drives a new operator from a name and a math spec through environment, project init, two-level tiling design, op_host/op_kernel code generation and framework registration, compile/install/debug, PyTorch-style API docs, precision evaluation and root-cause debugging, torch_npu.profiler performance benchmarking, performance optimization, and security code review.
